subcodes.first_line: O eloquent and articulate poet, what the poets of the world have uttered and strung together hath, for the most part, been contrary to reality; therefore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظم فصیح بلیغ شعرای آفاق آنچه گفتند و در سفتند اکثر مخالف واقع بود لهذا
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @poems and quotation from poetry, @praise and encouragement, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
